name: arifOS
description: Constitutional AI kernel — 13 floors, 6-axis orthogonal routing, VAULT999 sealing. 8 canonical MCP tools (the Canonical 9 minus compose). JUDGES, NEVER MUTES.

skills.name: Session Lifecycle
skills.description: Kernel ignition binds actor, floors and audit envelope; memory governor routes L1–L6 under F1/F2/F4/F11.

tools.name: arif_init
tools.description: KERNEL 000 · Session ignition. Binds actor, floors, and audit before any other arif_* verb can govern. Without session_id the kernel treats the caller as anonym

tools.name: arif_memory
tools.description: KERNEL memory governor · L1–L6 under F1/F2/F4/F11 (not a free notepad). Modes: recall | inspect | attest | remember | promote | revise | forget. Writes are J-sp

skills.name: Evidence Sensing
skills.description: Sense reality into evidence (not reasoning, not verdict). Search corpus, fetch, vitals, repo map.

tools.name: arif_observe
tools.description: KERNEL 111 · Sense reality into evidence (not reasoning, not judgment). Modes: search | fetch | ingest | vitals | compass | atlas | entropy_dS | repo_map | hybr

examples: observe topic: malay basin thermal maturity

skills.name: Structured Reasoning
skills.description: KERNEL 333 — Mind. Plan, critique, analyze, verify under F2/F7. Not chain-of-thought narration.

tools.name: arif_think
tools.description: KERNEL 333 · Mind — structured reasoning under F2/F7 (not chat, not verdict). Modes: reason | reflect | verify | plan | plan_review | plan_approve | refactor_pl

examples: think: critique governor capacity at stress 0.6

skills.name: Intent → Organ → Execution
skills.description: KERNEL 444 routes intent to GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/etc; KERNEL 777 governs execution through A-FORGE (hands, not law).

tools.name: arif_route
tools.description: KERNEL 444 · Intent→organ router (default path to GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/A-FORGE). Select when goal is known but organ/verb is not. Optional organ_tool = governed bri

tools.name: arif_forge
tools.description: KERNEL 777 · Execution gate via A-FORGE (hands, not law). Mutates only after arif_judge SEAL + lease/chain IDs — no self-authorize. Modes: dry_run | engineer |

examples: forge execute via A-FORGE with seal

skills.name: Constitutional Verdict
skills.description: KERNEL 888 — only organ that emits SEAL/HOLD/SABAR/VOID. Required for any irreversible action.

tools.name: arif_judge
tools.description: KERNEL 888 · Constitutional verdict — only organ that SEAL/HOLD/SABAR/VOIDs. Not advice; binding floor + authority arbitration. Requires actor, intent, domain,

skills.name: VAULT999 Seal
skills.description: KERNEL 999 — VAULT999 immutable append. Once sealed, the record IS the fossil layer of the institution learning itself.

tools.name: arif_seal
tools.description: KERNEL 999 · VAULT999 immutable append — irreversible civilizational memory. Modes: seal | verify | chain | list | dry_run. seal requires ack_irreversible. Kern
